---
title: "Total Area Anal"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

combined_df <- read_excel("C:/Users/brody/Desktop/Brody Thesis Project/Data Sets/combined_coral_benthic_fish.xlsx")
```

```{r}
combined_df1 <- combined_df %>%
  filter(!Year %in% c(2018, 2024)) |> 
   mutate(
    Year = factor(Year),
    Treatment = factor(Treatment),
    Block = factor(Block)
  )
```

```{r}
combined_df1 <- combined_df1 %>%
  mutate(
    Treatment = factor(
      Treatment,
      levels = c("Con", "1x1", "2x2", "TopOnly")
    )
  )
```


```{r}
combined_df2 <- combined_df1 %>%
  mutate(across(
    c(CCA_calcareous, Fleshy_MA, `Lobo/Peys`,
      Scleractinian, SPAT, TAS,
      Grazerdetritivore, Herbivore_Sc_Br),
    scale
  ))
```

###############################################################################################################################

## Treatment and Year

```{r}
library(lme4)

t1 <- glmer(
  total_coral_area_cm2 ~ Treatment + (1 | Block),
  data = combined_df2,
  family = Gamma(link="log"),
)

t2 <- glmer(
  total_coral_area_cm2 ~ Year + (1 | Block),
  data = combined_df2,
  family = Gamma(link="log"),
)

t3 <- glmer(
  total_coral_area_cm2 ~ Treatment + Year + (1 | Block),
  data = combined_df2,
  family = Gamma(link="log"),
)

t4 <- glmer(
  total_coral_area_cm2 ~ Treatment * Year + (1 | Block),
 data = combined_df2,
  family = Gamma(link="log"),
)

anova(t1, t2, t3, t4)
```


###############################################################################################################################




## Total area using gamma glm
```{r}
library(lme4)

full_area <- glmer(
  total_coral_area_cm2 ~ Treatment +
  Year + 
  #CCA_calcareous +
  Fleshy_MA +
  `Lobo/Peys` +
  #Scleractinian +
  SPAT +
  TAS +
  Grazerdetritivore +
  Herbivore_Sc_Br +
  (1|Block),
  data = combined_df2,
  family = Gamma(link="log")
)
```



## Dredge 

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(MuMIn)

options(na.action = "na.fail")

dredge(full_area, fixed = "Year")

#best_area <- get.models(dredge_area, 1)[[1]]

#summary(dredge_area)
#summary(best_area)
```
